title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Chamomile essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. It has the ability to balance the scalp's pH level, reducing excess oil production and purifying the pores. Additionally, chamomile oil has a soothing effect on the scalp, calming irritation and redness caused by oily hair. This results in a healthy, manageable mane that looks great and feels wonderful....
